title: Chaos Datapack
description: A datapack that makes minecraft more chaotic
body:
A datapack that makes the game worse.
Every 30 seconds an event occurse for a random player.
As of beta 4 there are 50 uniqe-ish events that can occur, from getting a enchanted golden apple to creating a hole all the way to bedrock.

To start the datapack type `/relaod` into chat and instructions should appear.

You can also change the amount of time untill each event with this command. 
```
/scoreboard players set reset_time chaos_vars x
```
Where x is the amount of ticks between each event.
